full_text:
Zhan Qiang 詹強
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhan Qiang (詹強)was born in Kuaiji. Murdered Shang Sheng rather then surrender to He Qi but was later forced to do so anyway. Zhan Qiang was affiliated with Wang Lang, Shang Sheng, Zhan Qian, and the Wu Kingdom.
